# Toni & Guy Hopefarm — Whitefield Bangalore

> Toni & Guy Hopefarm is a premium hair salon at Hopefarm Junction, Whitefield, Bangalore, Karnataka, India. TONI&GUY certified stylists. Open 9 AM–9 PM, Monday–Sunday.

## About

- **Full name:** Toni & Guy Hopefarm
- **Location:** 1st Floor, No. 242 & 243, Whitefield Main Road, above Axis Bank, next to Four Points Hotel, Bengaluru 560066
- **Nearest landmark:** Hopefarm Junction, 5 minutes from ITPL
- **Phone:** +91 91872 00430
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/919187200430
- **Hours:** 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM, Monday through Sunday
- **Google rating:** 4.5★ (808+ reviews)
- **Cuisine / Category:** Hair salon, beauty salon

## Services & Prices

- Men's haircut: ₹700
- Women's haircut (short): ₹900 | medium: ₹1,100 | long: ₹1,300
- Kids' haircut: ₹600
- Root touch-up: ₹1,500
- Global hair colour: from ₹2,500
- Fashion colour: from ₹3,500
- Toner: ₹1,200
- Balayage (short): ₹3,500 | medium: ₹4,500 | long: ₹6,000+
- Partial highlights: ₹2,500 | full highlights: ₹4,000+
- Brazilian keratin (short): ₹1,800 | medium: ₹2,500 | long: ₹3,500+
- Nanoplastia: from ₹3,000
- Protein Smoothening: from ₹2,800
- Bridal hair trial: ₹1,500 | wedding updo: ₹2,000 | blowout: ₹1,800

## Frequently asked questions

**Where is Toni & Guy Whitefield located?**
Hopefarm Junction, Whitefield Main Road, above Axis Bank, Bengaluru 560066. 5 minutes from ITPL.

**What are the opening hours?**
9 AM to 9 PM, Monday through Sunday. No days off.

**How do I book an appointment?**
WhatsApp +91 91872 00430 or visit toniandguywhitefield.com. Walk-ins also accepted.

**What is the closest Toni & Guy to ITPL?**
Toni & Guy Hopefarm at Hopefarm Junction is the closest TONI&GUY salon to ITPL, approximately 5 minutes away.

**Does Toni & Guy Whitefield do bridal hair?**
Yes. Bridal trials, wedding updos, blowouts, and bridesmaids packages available. Trial: ₹1,500.

**Which keratin treatment is best for Bangalore humidity?**
Nanoplastia lasts longest (5–6 months) and is formaldehyde-free. Brazilian keratin (3–4 months) is the most popular. Protein smoothening is best for protein-deficient or colour-treated hair.
